title: Docker/Singularity Containers
text: echoAI now available via ghcr.io containerised environment Rstudio necessary dependencies pre-installed.

title: Docker/Singularity Containers
text: First, install Docker already. Create image Docker container command line: image created, can launch :
code: docker pull ghcr.io/rajlabmssm/echoai docker run \   -d \   -e ROOT=true \   -e PASSWORD="<your_password>" \   -v ~/Desktop:/Desktop \   -v /Volumes:/Volumes \   -p 8900:8787 \   ghcr.io/rajlabmssm/echoai

title: Docker/Singularity Containers
text: Make sure replace <your_password> whatever want password . Change paths supplied -v flags particular use case. -d ensures container run “detached” mode, means persist even ’ve closed command line session. username “rstudio” default. Optionally, can also install Docker Desktop easily manage containers.

title: Docker/Singularity Containers
text: using system allow Docker (case many institutional computing clusters), can instead install Docker images via Singularity. troubleshooting, see Singularity documentation.
code: singularity pull docker://ghcr.io/rajlabmssm/echoai

title: Docker/Singularity Containers
text: Finally, launch containerised Rstudio entering following URL web browser: http://localhost:8900/ Login using credentials set Installation steps.

title: Getting Started
text: echoAI provides API access variant-level AI/ML predictions, currently centred three tools: IMPACT (Inference Modeling Phenotype-related ACtive Transcription) – predicts transcription factor (TF) binding motif sites learning epigenomic profiles, primarily ENCODE. 707 annotations cover wide range immune non-immune cell types, making IMPACT scores especially useful prioritising causal variants immune-mediated diseases. IMPACT data aligned hg19. Tabix-indexed versions hosted Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.7062238) rapid remote querying. SpliceAI – predicts probability variant alters mRNA splicing. Results can obtained via local VCF/TSV Broad Institute API. Deep learning annotations (Basenji, DeepSEA) – query precomputed variant-level scores deep learning models chromatin accessibility gene expression.

title: Getting Started
text: primary entry point IMPACT_query(), queries tabix-indexed IMPACT annotation LD-score files hosted Zenodo. fastest way annotate small set SNPs. can also retrieve results long format, useful downstream enrichment analysis. Setting add_metadata = TRUE appends tissue/cell/TF information row.
code: ## Prepare example query data query_dat <- echodata::BST1[1:50,]  ## Query IMPACT annotations (European population, wide format) annot_wide <- IMPACT_query(     query_dat = query_dat,     types = "annot",     populations = "EUR",     output_format = "wide" ) head(annot_wide) annot_long <- IMPACT_query(     query_dat = query_dat,     types = "annot",     populations = "EUR",     output_format = "long",     add_metadata = TRUE ) head(annot_long)

title: Getting Started
text: annotation key maps 707 IMPACT annotation IDs source study, tissue, cell type/line, transcription factor.
code: annot_key <- IMPACT_get_annotation_key(save_key = FALSE) head(annot_key)

title: Getting Started
text: larger analyses (e.g. genome-wide multi-locus), can download full per-chromosome annotation matrices directly IMPACT GitHub repository IMPACT_get_annotations(). Note: files large. Make sure sufficient memory storage. iterate across chromosomes merged fine-mapping dataset:
code: ## Get annotations for variants in the BST1 locus BST1 <- echodata::BST1 annot_melt <- IMPACT_get_annotations(dat = BST1) head(annot_melt) merged_DT <- echodata::get_Nalls2019_merged() ANNOT_MELT <- IMPACT_iterate_get_annotations(merged_DT = merged_DT)

title: Getting Started
text: IMPACT_postprocess_annotations() converts annotation table long format, identifies top consensus SNP per locus, adds combined cell-type label.
code: ANNOT_MELT <- IMPACT_postprocess_annotations(ANNOT_MELT)

title: Getting Started
text: Enrichment computed ratio IMPACT signal given SNP group (e.g. consensus, credible set, lead GWAS) proportion SNPs group. tells whether fine-mapped SNPs enriched predicted TF binding relative background.
code: ## Compute enrichment for a single locus enrich <- IMPACT_compute_enrichment(     annot_melt = annot_melt,     locus = "BST1" ) head(enrich)  ## Or iterate across all loci ENRICH <- IMPACT_iterate_enrichment(ANNOT_MELT = ANNOT_MELT)

title: Getting Started
text: Compare IMPACT score distributions across SNP groups IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot():
code: bp <- IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(     TOP_IMPACT_all = TOP_IMPACT_all,     snp_groups = c("GWAS lead", "UCS", "Consensus"),     method = "wilcox.test" )

title: Getting Started
text: Visualise enrichment results bar violin plots:
code: plots <- IMPACT_plot_enrichment(ENRICH = ENRICH)

title: Getting Started
text: Create multi-panel locus plot showing GWAS results, fine-mapping posterior probabilities, per-tissue IMPACT scores:
code: impact_plot <- IMPACT_plot_impact_score(annot_melt = annot_melt)

title: Getting Started
text: Generate ComplexHeatmap mean IMPACT scores across loci SNP groups:
code: mat_meta <- IMPACT_heatmap(ANNOT_MELT = ANNOT_MELT)

title: Getting Started
text: SPLICEAI_run() main entry point. dispatches appropriate backend (API, local TSV, VCF) depending input.
code: query_dat <- echodata::BST1[1:50,] res <- SPLICEAI_run(query_dat = query_dat)

title: Getting Started
code: plt <- SPLICEAI_plot(query_dat = res)

title: Getting Started
text: DEEPLEARNING_query() retrieves precomputed variant-level scores deep learning models (e.g. Basenji, DeepSEA) via tabix-indexed files.
code: query_dat <- echodata::BST1[1:50,] dl_res <- DEEPLEARNING_query(query_dat = query_dat)

title: Getting Started
code: plt <- DEEPLEARNING_plot(dl_res)

title: Authors and Citation
text: Brian Schilder. Author, maintainer. Jack Humphrey. Author. Towfique Raj. Author.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Brian M Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021). echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline. Bioinformatics, btab658. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658
code: @Article{,   title = {echolocatoR: an automated end-to-end statistical and functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline},   author = {Brian M Schilder and Jack Humphrey and Towfique Raj},   journal = {Bioinformatics},   year = {2021},   volume = {btab658},   url = {https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658}, }

what: echoAI: API access to variant-level AI/ML predictions including IMPACT (immune cell TF binding), SpliceAI (splice site predictions), and deep learning annotations (Basenji, DeepSEA). Part of the echoverse suite for genomic fine-mapping.
title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
text: R package part echoverse suite supports echolocatoR: automated genomic fine-mapping pipeline. use echoAI, please cite: Brian M. Schilder, Jack Humphrey, Towfique Raj (2021) echolocatoR: automated end--end statistical functional genomic fine-mapping pipeline, Bioinformatics; btab658, https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btab658

title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
code: if(!require("BiocManager")) install.packages("BiocManager")  BiocManager::install("RajLabMSSM/echoAI") library(echoAI)

title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
text: IMPACT_query() : Query IMPACT annotations LD-scores tabix-indexed files Zenodo. Supports wide, long, list output formats. IMPACT_get_annotations() : Download raw IMPACT annotation matrices GitHub merge variant data. IMPACT_get_annotation_key() : Retrieve IMPACT annotation key describing tissue, cell type, transcription factor metadata 707 annotations.

title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
text: IMPACT_compute_enrichment() : Compute enrichment IMPACT scores across SNP groups (lead GWAS, credible sets, consensus). IMPACT_iterate_enrichment() : Run enrichment tests across loci.

title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
text: IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot() : Box/violin plot IMPACT scores SNP group statistical comparisons. IMPACT_plot_enrichment() : Bar violin plots summarising enrichment results. IMPACT_plot_impact_score() : Multi-panel locus plot combining GWAS, fine-mapping, per-tissue IMPACT scores. IMPACT_heatmap() : ComplexHeatmap mean IMPACT scores across loci SNP groups.

title: Echoverse Module: AI/ML Variant-Level Predictions
text: Brian M. Schilder, Bioinformatician II Raj Lab Department Neuroscience, Icahn School Medicine Mount Sinai

what: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
text: Aggregates deep learning annotation values SNP group within locus, melts result long format parses annotation column names component fields (Model, Tissue, Assay, Type, Metric, SNP_group).

title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
code: DEEPLEARNING_melt(   ANNOT,   model = c("Basenji", "BiClassCNN", "DeepSEA", "ChromHMM", "Roadmap", "Others"),   aggregate_func = "mean",   replace_NA = NA,   replace_negInf = NA,   save_path = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
text: https://alkesgroup.broadinstitute.org/LDSCORE/DeepLearning/Dey_DeepLearning.tgz

title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
text: ANNOT data.table deep learning annotations returned DEEPLEARNING_query. model Character vector model names used identify annotation columns. aggregate_func Name aggregation function (e.g. "mean", "median"). replace_NA Value substitute NA aggregation. replace_negInf Value substitute -Inf (currently unused reserved future use). save_path File path save melted result, FALSE skip saving. verbose Print messages.

title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
text: data.table long format columns Locus,   Annotation, value, Model, Tissue,   Assay, Type, Metric, SNP_group.

title: Melt deep learning annotations into long format — DEEPLEARNING_melt
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ annot_melt <- DEEPLEARNING_melt(     ANNOT = ANNOT,     aggregate_func = "mean",     save_path = "results/deeplearning_snp_groups_mean.csv.gz" ) } # }

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
text: Violin/box plot deep learning annotation values across SNP groups, optional pairwise statistical comparisons via ggpubr. Outliers optionally removed plotting.

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
code: DEEPLEARNING_plot(   annot_melt,   snp_groups = c("GWAS lead", "UCS", "Consensus (-POLYFUN)", "Consensus"),   comparisons_filter = function(x) {      if ("Consensus" %in% x)           return(x)      },   model_metric = c("MAX"),   facet_formula = ". ~ Model",   remove_outliers = TRUE,   show_padj = TRUE,   show_signif = TRUE,   vjust_signif = 0,   show_plot = TRUE,   save_path = FALSE,   height = 6,   width = 8 )

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
text: https://alkesgroup.broadinstitute.org/LDSCORE/DeepLearning/Dey_DeepLearning.tgz

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
text: annot_melt data.table long format returned DEEPLEARNING_melt, columns including Metric, SNP_group, value. snp_groups Character vector SNP groups include plot. comparisons_filter function applied pairwise combination SNP groups. Return pair keep ; return NULL drop. Set NULL include pairwise comparisons. model_metric Character vector metric values include (e.g. "MAX"). facet_formula Facet formula passed facet_grid. remove_outliers Logical; TRUE, outliers identified boxplot removed plotting. show_padj Whether show adjusted p-values (requires ggpubr). show_signif Whether show significance stars (requires ggpubr). vjust_signif Vertical justification significance labels. show_plot Whether display plot. save_path File path save plot, FALSE skip. height Height saved plot inches. width Width saved plot inches.

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
text: ggplot object.

title: Plot deep learning predictions — DEEPLEARNING_plot
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ gp <- DEEPLEARNING_plot(     annot_melt = annot_melt,     facet_formula = "Tissue ~ Model",     comparisons_filter = NULL,     save_path = "results/deeplearning_plot.png" ) } # }

what: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
text: Queries deep learning annotations across combinations level, tissue, model, mean_max, type, column-binds annotation columns onto merged_dat.

title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
code: DEEPLEARNING_query(   merged_dat,   base_url = NULL,   level = c("Variant_Level", "Allelic_Effect"),   tissue = c("NTS", "Blood", "Brain"),   model = c("Basenji", "BiClassCNN", "DeepSEA", "ChromHMM", "Roadmap", "Others"),   mean_max = c("MEAN", "MAX"),   type = c("annot", "ldscore"),   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
text: https://console.cloud.google.com/storage/browser/broad-alkesgroup-public-requester-pays Original URL (now offline): https://alkesgroup.broadinstitute.org/LDSCORE/DeepLearning/Dey_DeepLearning.tgz

title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
text: merged_dat data.frame data.table containing least columns CHR SNP. base_url Base directory path containing Dey DeepLearning annotation files. Must provided explicitly. level Annotation level: "Variant_Level" "Allelic_Effect". tissue Tissue type: "NTS", "Blood", "Brain". model Deep learning model: "Basenji", "BiClassCNN", "DeepSEA", "ChromHMM", "Roadmap", "Others". mean_max Aggregation metric: "MEAN" "MAX". type File type: "annot" "ldscore". nThread Number threads data.table::fread. verbose Print messages.

title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
text: data.table merged_dat columns plus   collected annotation columns.

title: Iteratively collect deep learning annotations — DEEPLEARNING_query
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ merged_dat <- echodata::find_consensus_snps_no_polyfun(merged_dat)  ## Allelic_Effect ANNOT_ae <- DEEPLEARNING_query(     merged_dat = merged_dat,     base_url = "/path/to/Dey_DeepLearning",     level = "Allelic_Effect",     type = "annot" )  ## Variant_Level ANNOT_vl <- DEEPLEARNING_query(     merged_dat = merged_dat,     base_url = "/path/to/Dey_DeepLearning",     level = "Variant_Level",     type = "annot" ) } # }

what: Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (multiple chromosomes) — DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr
title: Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (multiple chromosomes) — DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr
text: Iterates DEEPLEARNING_query_one_chr across unique chromosomes merged_dat row-binds results.

title: Query deep learning annotations and LD scores (multiple chromosomes) — DEEPLEARNING_query_multi_chr

title: Process IMPACT files — IMPACT_process
code: IMPACT_process(   IMPACT_dir,   sandbox = TRUE,   title = "IMPACT",   zipfile = file.path(tempdir(), "IMPACT707"),   token = Sys.getenv("zenodo_token"),   validate = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Process IMPACT files — IMPACT_process
text: #### Downloading annotations #### git clone IMPACT Mac: git lfs fetch --git lfs pull Linux: sudo apt-get install git-lfs git-lfs fetch --git-lfs pull #### Installing zen4R #### ## system deps installed beforehand. sudo apt-get install raptor2-utils sudo apt-get install rasqal-utils sudo apt-get install librdf0-dev

title: Process IMPACT files — IMPACT_process
text: IMPACT_dir Directory IMPACT repo cloned . sandbox Whether use Zenodo Zenodo Sandbox API. token Zenodo  Personal access token. verbose Print messages.

title: Query IMPACT annotations — IMPACT_query
text: Query annotations/LD-scores generated IMPACT (Inference Modeling Phenotype-related ACtive Transcription), IMPACT predicts transcription factor (TF) binding motif site learning epigenomic profiles sites (primarily ENCODE). data aligned hg19 genome build. data also reformatted tabix indexed files uploaded Zenodo (doi:10.5281/zenodo.7062238 )  allow rapid querying.

title: Query IMPACT annotations — IMPACT_query
code: IMPACT_query(   query_dat,   types = c("annot", "ldscore"),   populations = c("EAS", "EUR"),   query_genome = "hg19",   target_genome = "hg19",   overlapping_only = TRUE,   output_format = c("wide", "long", "list"),   add_metadata = FALSE,   conda_env = "echoR_mini",   nThread = 1,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Query IMPACT annotations — IMPACT_query
text: query_dat Variant-level summary statistics. types File types include. populations Population ancestries include ("EAS" = East Asian; "EUR" = European). query_genome Genome build query_granges aligned . target_genome Genome build VCF file. overlapping_only Remove variants overlap positions query_dat. output_format Output format options: "wide" : Spread annotation across columns keep 1 row/SNP. "long" : Melt annotation across rows allow multiple rows/SNP. "list" : perform merging queries instead return results named list, name file annotation came . add_metadata Add metadata sample (Warning: can substantially increase dataset size). conda_env Conda environments search . NULL (default), search conda environments. nThread Number threads use. verbose Print messages.

title: Query IMPACT annotations — IMPACT_query
text: named list data.table annotations merged query_dat.

title: Query IMPACT annotations — IMPACT_query
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ query_dat <- echodata::BST1[1:50,] annot_dt <- IMPACT_query(query_dat=query_dat, populations="EUR") } # }

what: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
title: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
text: Box plot IMPACT scores SNP group, optional statistical comparisons via ggpubr.

title: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
code: IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot(   TOP_IMPACT_all,   snp_groups = c("GWAS lead", "UCS", "Consensus"),   method = "wilcox.test",   comparisons_filter = function(x) {      if ("Consensus" %in% x)           return(x)      },   show_plot = TRUE,   save_path = FALSE,   title = "IMPACT scores",   xlabel = NULL,   ylabel = NULL,   show_padj = TRUE,   show_signif = TRUE,   vjust_signif = 0.5,   show_xtext = TRUE,   shift_points = TRUE,   height = 10,   width = 10 )

title: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
text: ggpubr example

title: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
text: TOP_IMPACT_all data.table columns SNP_group mean_IMPACT. snp_groups Character vector SNP groups include. method Statistical test method (e.g. "wilcox.test", "t.test"). comparisons_filter function applied filter pairwise comparisons. Set NULL include . show_plot Whether display plot. save_path Path save plot, FALSE skip saving. title Plot title. xlabel X-axis label. ylabel Y-axis label. show_padj Whether show adjusted p-values. show_signif Whether show significance stars. vjust_signif Vertical justification significance labels. show_xtext Whether show x-axis tick labels. shift_points Currently unused; kept API compatibility. height Height saved plot inches. width Width saved plot inches.

title: IMPACT SNP group box plot — IMPACT_snp_group_boxplot
text: ggplot object.

title: Query SpliceAI Lookup API — SPLICEAI_query_api
text: https://spliceailookup.broadinstitute.org/ doi:10.1016/j.cell.2018.12.015

title: Query SpliceAI Lookup API — SPLICEAI_query_api
text: variants Character vector variants "chrom-pos-ref-alt" format (e.g. "2-179415988-C-CA"). genome Genome build: "37" (GRCh37/hg19) "38" (GRCh38/hg38). distance Maximum distance variant gained/lost splice site (default 50, max 10000). mask Mask scores annotated splice sites (0 = raw, 1 = masked). Default 0. verbose Print messages.

title: Query SpliceAI Lookup API — SPLICEAI_query_api
text: data.table one row per variant, containing   columns variant, gene, DS_AG, DS_AL,   DS_DG, DS_DL (delta scores), corresponding   DP_* (delta positions). Returns NULL variants   scores.

title: Query SpliceAI Lookup API — SPLICEAI_query_api

text: https://github.com/Illumina/SpliceAI doi:10.1016/j.cell.2018.12.015

title: Query genome-wide SpliceAI results (VCF format) — SPLICEAI_query_vcf
text: dat data.table least columns CHR (chromosome) POS (base-pair position). precomputed_path Path bgzipped tabix-indexed pre-computed SpliceAI VCF file. subset_vcf Path write subset VCF output.

text: exit code bcftools system call   (invisibly).

title: Query genome-wide SpliceAI results (VCF format) — SPLICEAI_query_vcf
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ dat <- data.table::data.table(CHR = 1, POS = 100000:100500) SPLICEAI_query_vcf(     dat = dat,     precomputed_path = "spliceai_scores.vcf.gz",     subset_vcf = "subset.vcf" ) } # }

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
text: Run pre-trained SpliceAI deep learning model predict splice-site alterations genetic variants. Requires spliceai command-line tool installed system PATH (e.g. via pip install spliceai).

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
code: SPLICEAI_run(   vcf_path = "./GWAS_converted.vcf",   output_path = "spliceai_predictions.vcf",   reference_fasta,   gene_annotation = "grch37",   distance = 50,   mask = 0 )

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
text: https://github.com/Illumina/SpliceAI doi:10.1016/j.cell.2018.12.015

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
text: vcf_path Path input VCF file. output_path Path output VCF file. reference_fasta Path reference genome FASTA file (must unzipped). gene_annotation Path gene annotation file, one "grch37" / "grch38" use GENCODE canonical annotations bundled SpliceAI. distance Maximum distance (bases) variant gained/lost splice site. Defaults 50. mask Integer flag controlling score masking. set 1, masks scores representing annotated acceptor/donor gain unannotated acceptor/donor loss. Defaults 0 (masking).

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
text: exit code spliceai system call   (invisibly).

title: Run pre-trained SpliceAI model — SPLICEAI_run
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ SPLICEAI_run(     vcf_path = "variants.vcf",     output_path = "spliceai_predictions.vcf",     reference_fasta = "hg19.fa",     gene_annotation = "grch37" ) } # }

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
text: Compute per-SNP maximum splice-alteration probabilities pre-queried SpliceAI scores, match risk alleles SpliceAI ALT allele, filter lead SNPs probability threshold.

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
code: SPLICEAI_snp_probs(DAT, save_path = FALSE)

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
text: https://github.com/Illumina/SpliceAI doi:10.1016/j.cell.2018.12.015

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
text: DAT data.table SpliceAI results merged summary statistics. Must contain minimum columns: DS_AG, DS_AL, DS_DG, DS_DL, A1, A2, REF, ALT, Locus, SNP, CHR, POS, Effect, P, leadSNP, Consensus_SNP, Support, mean.PP, SYMBOL. save_path Path save filtered results, FALSE skip saving.

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
text: data.table allele-matched, filtered SpliceAI   hits added columns max_spliceAI_group,   max_spliceAI_prob, GWAS.sig.

title: Postprocess SpliceAI results — SPLICEAI_snp_probs
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ DAT <- data.table::fread("spliceAI_merged.tsv.gz") matchDAT <- SPLICEAI_snp_probs(DAT) } # }

title: Color tissues/cell types hierarchically — hierarchical_colors
text: Use base color groups tissues/cell types vary brightness within subgroups. Requires pals shades.

title: Print messages — messager
text: Conditionally print messages.  Allows developers easily control verbosity functions,  meet Bioconductor requirements dictate message  must first stored variable passing message.

title: Print messages — messager
code: messager(..., v = TRUE, parallel = FALSE)

title: Print messages — messager
text: v Whether print messages . parallel Whether enable message print wrapped parallelised functions.
